title: Brand livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Brand livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to brand livestock

pcs.text: Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary.

pcs.text: Clean and prepare branding equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions and safe work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and prepare branding equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions and safe work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and prepare branding equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions and safe work practices.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, materials or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, materials or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, materials or PPE to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to brand livestock

elements.title: Identify and brand livestock

pcs.text: Move livestock using good stock handling techniques in readiness for branding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move livestock using good stock handling techniques in readiness for branding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move livestock using good stock handling techniques in readiness for branding.

pcs.text: Assess and control risks prior to carrying out branding activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and control risks prior to carrying out branding activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and control risks prior to carrying out branding activity.

pcs.text: Use good stock handling techniques to restrain livestock for safety of animal, handler and branding officer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use good stock handling techniques to restrain livestock for safety of animal, handler and branding officer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use good stock handling techniques to restrain livestock for safety of animal, handler and branding officer.

pcs.text: Identify location on animal for applying brand according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location on animal for applying brand according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location on animal for applying brand according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Apply correct timing and techniques required to achieve a legible and lasting brand
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply correct timing and techniques required to achieve a legible and lasting brand?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply correct timing and techniques required to achieve a legible and lasting brand.

pcs.text: Brand livestock according to safe workplace practices and animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brand livestock according to safe workplace practices and animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brand livestock according to safe workplace practices and animal welfare requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and brand livestock

elements.title: Complete branding operation

pcs.text: Record and report animal numbers during and on completion of operations according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report animal numbers during and on completion of operations according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report animal numbers during and on completion of operations according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Prepare and move animals away from branding area to a suitable recovery area, along a planned route using good stock handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and move animals away from branding area to a suitable recovery area, along a planned route using good stock handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and move animals away from branding area to a suitable recovery area, along a planned route using good stock handling techniques.

pcs.text: Mother-up young livestock where required as soon as possible once branding is completed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mother-up young livestock where required as soon as possible once branding is completed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mother-up young livestock where required as soon as possible once branding is completed.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store branding equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store branding equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store branding equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Return materials to store and dispose of waste according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return materials to store and dispose of waste according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return materials to store and dispose of waste according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes, and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes, and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes, and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock behaviour and welfare post-branding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock behaviour and welfare post-branding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock behaviour and welfare post-branding.
